programme.desc: All the kids are paired with adults with interesting jobs except Arnold, who is forced to spend time with the Jolly Olly Man. / Harold believes it's his life's calling to become a butcher, but he slowly drives Mr. Greene, the butcher, crazy.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Casa Paradiso/Gerald''s Tonsils: Grandpa becomes tired of dealing with the boarding house and decides to sell./Gerald has his tonsils removed before a big concert and must come to grips with the fact that his voice has changed.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Phoebe Takes the Fall/The Pig War: Phoebe agrees to take a dive so that Helga can win a competition./The boys engage in a recreation of a historical battle, only this time their prized pig is in danger of losing his life.

programme.desc: Best Man/Cool Party: The Coach wants to remarry Tish and asks Arnold to be his best man./ Rhonda has a party and only invites the cool kids.

programme.desc: Grandpa's Birthday/Road Trip: Grandpa thinks he's going to die soon because no one in his family ever made it past his age. He prepares to die, and Arnold tries to convince him that life is still worth living.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold and Lila/Grand Prix: Helga, lost in a love reverie, writes "Arnold loves Helga" on a wall, but changes the name to "Lila" when the kids approach. Lila thinks that Arnold loves her until he explains the mistake.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Girl Trouble/School Dance: Arnold tells Grandpa he''s tired of dealing with Helga''s nonsense. Grandpa tells Arnold a story about a girl he had to deal with when he was a kid who treated him the same way. She turns out to be Grandma.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga's Show/Flood: Helga does a standup routine at a school function and proceeds to insult all of her friends. They are offended, prompting her to change her act to a more friendly and gentle routine. She performs the new act, but it's boring.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold and Helga perform a \"Romeo and Juliet\"- type play for a school production

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: At the Parent's Day competition, Arnold learns that even though he doesn't have \"real\" parents, his grandparents are just as good as everyone else's parents.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Beeper Queen/Oscar Can't Read?
programme.desc: Beeper Queen: Big Bob pulls his back and cannot go to a very important meeting. Not knowing who else to send in his place, he asks Helga. Oscar Can't Read?: When Arnold discovers that Oskar has been pretending to know how to read, Arnold confronts him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: The Headless Cabbie/Friday the 13th

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: It Girl/Deconstructing Arnold

programme.desc: Grudge Match: Arnold and Grandpa vs Helga and Big Bob in a fender bender blame game. Polishing Rhonda: Rhonda and Patty's rivalry heats up at finishing school.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se dirige a las playas de California tras la aparición de varios cadáveres en torres de salvamento en la costa. Deberán averiguar que tienen los cuerpos en común y quién ha podido hacerlo. Por otro lado, Hotch invita a Beth a salir.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la muerte de un comandante de la marina tras la repentina explosión del cadáver antes de que Jimmy pudiera examinarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la muerte de un querido comandante de la Armada que entrenó a algunos de los mejores atletas del país.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la muerte de un hombre en un crucero cuyo cuerpo es descubierto en la sauna del barco por la suegra de McGee.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el caso de un reservista de la Marina cuyo cuerpo es encontrado en un coche destrozado en un campo de tiro. Además, Kasie sopesa los pros y los contras de comprar un arma.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Las cosas se vuelven personales para Danny cuando Luis Delgado, el sicario del cartel de la droga responsable de incendiar su casa, reaparece.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin y Frank se enfrentan sobre la nueva legislación de la oficina del fiscal que socava las políticas de Frank.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de policías siendo acosados por un grupo de personas en un complejo residencial, Frank ordena una redada para arrestar a cualquiera con una orden pendiente.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando aparece un video de oficiales participando en un claro caso de trampa, Frank se centra en encontrar al policía que filtró el video.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Los agentes de la UAC prueban su suerte en Atlantic City, cuando el equipo es llamado para investigar una serie de asesinatos ritualistas relacionados con el casino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se dirige a las playas de California tras la aparición de varios cadáveres en torres de salvamento en la costa. Deberán averiguar que tienen los cuerpos en común y quién ha podido hacerlo. Por otro lado, Hotch invita a Beth a salir.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales robos y asesinatos en hogares de Inland Empire, en California. Al parecer, se trata de ataques relacionados con bandas callejeras, pero la investigación pronto arroja una motivación aún más siniestra.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a Atlanta para investigar el asesinato de una mujer, descubriendo que el criminal no trabaja solo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el caso de un reservista de la Marina cuyo cuerpo es encontrado en un coche destrozado en un campo de tiro. Además, Kasie sopesa los pros y los contras de comprar un arma.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La ocurrencia de Grissom de que dos jóvenes amantes desaparecidos pueden haber huido a México queda pronto anulada por el descubrimiento de gotas de sangre junto a la plaza de aparcamiento libre del chico en el instituto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras procesa la casa donde fueron asesinadas varias coristas, Sara se ve atormentada por los ojos aterrorizados y las crípticas palabras moribundas de la sexta víctima que descubre.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En su intento por identificar al asesino de un ex boxeador que vivía entre un grupo de prostitutas que lo detestaban, los CSI deben establecer cuál de los varios actos que pusieron en peligro su vida en una noche realmente lo mató.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que el hombre que ella admira se case con su hermana, una joven mexicana le dedica su pasión a la cocina, descubriendo que puede transmitir sus emociones a través de las comidas que prepara.

programme.title: Ni Idea (Clueless)
programme.desc: El mundo de Cher se desenmaraña cuando aparecen dos galanes: un compañero de clase sexy, y su simple pero lindo ex hermanastro. Ahora se da cuenta de que cuando se trata de amor, no tiene ni idea.

programme.title: 40 días y 40 noches
programme.desc: Después de una ruptura amorosa y una serie de conquistas insatisfactorias, un hombre hace una promesa de no tener relaciones sexuales durante 40 días y 40 noches. Josh Hartnett y Shannyn Sossamon protagonizan esta sátira.

programme.title: El crimen del padre Amaro
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que el hombre que ella admira se case con su hermana, una joven mexicana le dedica su pasión a la cocina, descubriendo que puede transmitir sus emociones a través de las comidas que prepara.

programme.title: Jesus, Maria y Jose
programme.desc: Por la presecución del Rey Herodés de Judea, el niño Jesús y sus padres Maria y José huyen por el desierto de Egipto, donde el niño aprende sus primeras letras, culminando con al iniciacíon de su vida secreta.

programme.title: Jesús, el niño Dios
programme.desc: En Belén nace Jesús, el salvador enviado por Dios, pero el rey Herodes dispone que mueran todos los menores de tres años. Un ángel avisa a José para que se refugie con su familia en Egipto y un legionario conduce a la familia por el desierto.

programme.title: Jesús, nuestro Señor
programme.desc: Ultima parte de la trilogía dedicada a la vida de Jesús, donde se narran vida pública, pasión y muerte.

programme.title: Corona de Lagrimas
programme.desc: Refugio trabaja como contadora para poder mantener a sus tres hijos. Sin embargo, la vida de todos da un giro cuando uno de ellos es llevado a la cárcel y tienen que resolver sus propios problemas.

programme.title: Un disparo en la sombra
programme.desc: Al torpe inspector Clouseau (Peter Sellers) se le asigna un importante caso, pero se enamora de la principal sospechosa (Elke Sommer), aumentan los cadáveres y Clouseau debe darse prisa por encontrar al verdadero culpable o su carrera acabará.

programme.title: El Guia de las Turistas
programme.desc: Un grupo de hermosas turistas es defraudado por la compañía de turismo que las deja a la deriva y sin dinero. Capulina al saber del problema decide ponerse al frente de la gira como guía de turistas y tiene un éxito fabuloso.

programme.title: Hasta que llegó su hora
programme.desc: La historia épica de un misterioso desconocido con una armónica que se une a un conocido forajido para proteger a una hermosa viuda de un asesino despiadado que trabaja para el ferrocarril.

programme.title: Sangre, sudor y gloria
programme.desc: Un equipo de fisicoculturistas de Miami llevan una vida de lujo a través del secuestro y de la extorsión en esta comedia policial basada en una historia real.

programme.title: Ojos de serpiente
programme.desc: En Atlantic City, un intento de asesinato lleva a un detective (Nicolas Cage) a investigar un caso de homicidio con 14.000 posibles sospechosos y una conspiración mortal en la que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Un asesino anda suelto
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie está suelto y ha secuestrado al hijo de un agente del FBI que lo persigue. Pero, ¿quién es el asesino? Una historia llena de emociones y sorpresas.

programme.title: Sospecha Mortal
programme.desc: Richard Gere es Peck, y Andy Garcia es Raymond Avila, un investigador decidido a llevar a Peck a la justicia en este thriller policial emocionante.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: Dos madres angustiadas, cuyos hijos murieron por disparos en un automóvil en movimiento, se unen para vengar sus muertes después de que las autoridades locales no tomen medidas.

programme.title: Los intocables
programme.desc: El clásico enfrentamiento entre el bien y el mal, con Kevin Costner como el agente federal Eliot Ness, Robert De Niro como el jefe mafioso Al Capone y Sean Connery como Malone.

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: “Amistad” es la historia de un motín en 1839 a bordo de un barco de esclavos que viaja a la costa noroeste de Estados Unidos. Gran parte de la historia tiene que ver con un drama judicial sobre el esclavo que lideró la rebelión.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Corazón valiente, la detallada y feroz saga de combate, amor tierno y la voluntad de arriesgarlo todo por la libertad. Película de Mel Gibson, ganadora del Premio de la Academia®. En una actuación cargada de emociones.

programme.title: Bailando con lobos
programme.desc: Enviado para proteger un puesto fronterizo de Estados Unidos, el teniente John Dunbar se hace amigo de aquellos que él pensaba que tenía que temerle, los indios Sioux.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: Los últimos caballeros
programme.desc: Clive Owen protagoniza esta épica aventura del arte de pelear con espadas, un guerrero caído que lucha para vengar a su deshonrado maestro (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Sid 6.7, la máquina asesina
programme.desc: Es una combinación de las personalidades de unos 200 asesinos famosos. Es Sid 6.7, una creación de realidad virtual diseñada para probar a la policía de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hombres de élite
programme.desc: En este tenso thriller protagonizado por John Travolta y Kate Bosworth, un equipo de trabajadores de líneas eléctricas de Texas se apresura a instalar kilómetros de cable antes de que una mortal tormenta eléctrica destruya la red eléctrica.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: Bent: Plan de venganza
programme.desc: En este mordaz thriller policíaco, un policía desacreditado que busca al asesino de su compañero descubre accidentalmente una conspiración gubernamental vinculada al asesinato de una mujer con un coche bomba.

programme.title: Rescate al alba
programme.desc: Durante la guerra de Vietnam, el piloto americano, Dieter Dengler (Christian Bale) es derribado y tomado prisionero por el Vietcong. Durante su cautiverio, le tocó vivir una de las experiencias más notables y horrorosas de toda la guerra.

programme.title: La isla
programme.desc: Un hombre huye tras descubrir que en realidad es un “ser clonado”, y permanece junto a otros en un lugar único.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: La isla
programme.desc: Un hombre huye tras descubrir que en realidad es un “ser clonado”, y permanece junto a otros en un lugar único.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: Rugrats la película: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Con el nacimiento de su nuevo hermano Dylan, Tommy Pickles sabía que las cosas iban a cambiar, pero nunca esperó que ser un hermano pudiera ser tal aventura.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold! La película
programme.desc: Un empresario despiadado tiene un plan malvado: destruir el barrio de Arnold y construir un gran centro comercial. El tiempo es corto, y alguien debe salvarlos a todos, esa persona es Arnold.

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas

programme.title: Los lunamieleros
programme.desc: El conductor de autobuses Ralph Kramden y el ingeniero de saneamiento ambiental Ed Norton son amigos que sueñan con llegar lejos. Su plan para volverse ricos los hace contratar a un entrenador de perros (Leguizamo) para hacer competir a su galgo.

programme.title: Deslizando a la gloria
programme.desc: Dos rivales del patinaje artístico son expulsados tras una pelea por la medalla de oro. Al unir fuerzas, descubren una laguna en las reglas que les permite competir de nuevo… ¡como pareja!

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Viaje censurado
programme.desc: Cuatro amigos emprenden un viaje de 3000 kilómetros para recuperar un video ilícito enviado por error a una amiga.

programme.desc: Dos rivales del patinaje artístico son expulsados tras una pelea por la medalla de oro. Al unir fuerzas, descubren una laguna en las reglas que les permite competir de nuevo… ¡como pareja!

programme.title: Recién cazado
programme.desc: Sebastián es un destacado enólogo que lleva una vida desordenada y una mañana, al despertar de una parranda, descubre que contrajo matrimonio la noche anterior con Alexa. A partir de ese momento buscará anular el compromiso.

programme.title: A la mala
programme.desc: En esta brillante comedia, una bella actriz perseverante (Aislinn Derbez) es contratada para coquetear y luego abandonar a un apuesto ex productor, pero se termina enamorando de él.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: La mujer de mi hermano
programme.desc: Zoe e Ignacio llevan 10 años casados y la pasión se ha enfriado. Una Zoe sexualmente frustrada se siente físicamente atraída por su cuñado. Las cosas se complican aún más después de que ella queda embarazada y descubre que su esposo puede ser gay.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: Una despreocupada mujer mayor descubre algo inesperado después de una breve aventura con un oficial naval retirado que conoció en un club nocturno.

programme.desc: Una chica ciega recibe un trasplante de córnea para poder recuperar la vista. Sin embargo, recibe más de lo que esperaba cuando se da cuenta de que puede ver inquietantes fantasmas.

programme.title: San Valentín sangriento (2009)
programme.desc: Una nueva versión de la clásica película de terror de 1981 de George Mihalka, San Valentín sangriento tiene lugar diez años después de un devastador accidente en una mina de carbón con una serie de horribles asesinatos que atormentan a una pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Cazador de demonios
programme.desc: Un maldito pistolero (Wesley Snipes) cuyas víctimas regresan de entre los muertos, recluta a un joven guerrero para ayudar en la lucha contra una banda de zombies.

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: 666: El niño Diablo
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita desde el cielo hasta la Tierra. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adopte pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Victor Crowley
programme.desc: Diez años después de la terrible masacre, el único sobreviviente, Andrew Yong, se ve obligado a regresar al Pantano de la Isla Honey, pero por una de esas extrañas vueltas de la vida, Victor Crowley es resucitado por error.

programme.title: Pandemia lupina
programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!

programme.title: Fort Defiance

programme.desc: La policía descubre un carro agujereado de balas, un conductor extraviado y ningún testigo. ¿Será que la víctima fue raptada o ha sido asesinada?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los casos más inusuales en la historia forense. Los investigadores tuvieron que encontrar una manera de resolver un caso de asesinato con una evidencia que consistía en un tomate aplastado encontrado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un vecino vio cómo un hombre apuñalaba a su esposa, la empujaba a la piscina y le metía la cabeza bajo el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asistente del gerente de una carnicería de Florida es apuñalado hasta la muerte. Parece ser un robo que salió mal, pero una huella sangrienta revela que él conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, Julie Estes fue secuestrada de una tienda de conveniencia en Southside donde trabajaba. Su cuerpo fue encontrado al día siguiente, pero el asesinato quedó sin resolver hasta el 2003.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece y su esposo se convierte en el principal sospechoso – especialmente después de que la policía encuentra una gran mancha de sangre en la alfombra de su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A la mano
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía acusado de matar a su ex esposa insiste en que ella se suicidó. Los investigadores dicen que fue un asesinato, que era físicamente imposible que la mujer se disparara.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino cereal
programme.desc: Cuando un incendio destruyó la mayor parte de una casa y un niño desapareció, la policía organizó la búsqueda más grande en la historia de su pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 20 de Mayo del 2001, Carrie Nelson fue golpeado hasta su muerte mientras trabajaba en unas oficinas comerciales. El caso quedó sin resolver durante seis años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.desc: Richardson Hitchins and Gustavo Daniel Lemos headline, as the duo takes part in an IBF title eliminator.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Williams faces fellow Texas-based middleweight Ivan Vazquez in a scheduled ten-round contest.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates give panel interviews and solo performances before the rookies and veterans face off on the field and find out who makes it to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is on at training camp as both rookie and veteran candidates give it their all in front of their toughest audience yet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winner Tyce Diorio teaches the ladies to bring the magic as he puts them through a tough routine. Evan Miller challenges the DCC's power and musicality.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The DCC take the field for the first time in their signature DCC boots. Learning the DCC entrance proves very challenging for some, while others struggle to get accustomed to dancing in cowboy boots. Melissa Rycroft is featured.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The recruits do media training with NBC 5 Dallas-Fort Worth lead news anchors Meredith Land, Kelli, and Judy name two triangle points, and guest judge Melissa Rycroft sits in.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies put their modeling skills to the test on photoshoot day, Julia tries to bounce back after her car accident, and the dancers get a lesson in healthy cooking.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With one week until the start of the season, Kelli and Judy make a tough cut, the show group performs for the first time, and Charlotte Jones Anderson judges rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To make their final cut, Kelli and her team try to find one hopeful of the remaining 37 who isn't ready to perform at the Cowboys' home opener.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After an unusual online audition process, the rookie candidates for the 2020 squad move into an isolated training camp bubble amid the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 20 rookies try to master a socially distanced version of the famous kick line and some intricate choreography, and Kelli helps the ladies get fitted for uniforms.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The mysterious death of a young mother in Ohio and the ensuing investigation that spans years and multiple states.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Friends and family fear the worst when a 17-year-old girl training to be a pilot disappears over Montana during a solo flight.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man charged with murder claims he was too fat to have committed the crime; a man's double life is exposed after his wife is killed in a car accident.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a healthy 31-year-old father of three dies suddenly, an autopsy reveals poisoning by antifreeze.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a woman goes missing on Blood Mountain in the Chattahoochee National Forest, authorities suspect the man responsible was reenacting a horror movie.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Motivational speaker Rebecca Musser talks about her life in The Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints and what made her leave the denomination.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The parents of a missing South Carolina woman speak out about her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The mysterious death of a young mother in Ohio and the ensuing investigation that spans years and multiple states.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two suspects are arrested for the murder of a millionaire 15 years after the crime was committed.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When three teenage friends set out to pursue their dreams, one ends up dead.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Years after a woman is murdered in the back of her comic book store, new evidence is discovered that sends the investigation in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A young father in California calls 911 after being in a shootout in a car full of strangers that injures two people and kills another.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Jelly on the Telly
programme.desc: Flavor Flav wants a girl who knows how to move.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Famous Friends and Strangeness
programme.desc: Flavor Flav knows everyone who's anyone in the hip hop industry and today he wants to have them all over to his house.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Who Loves New York? (Photo Shoot To The Death)
programme.desc: Just like last season, Flav has invited a special guest from his past to help give him input on his selection of ladies.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Boxin' Each Other Out
programme.desc: The five girls left want the inside scoop, so he puts all five of the girls in the parlor with a ballot box and pictures of themselves.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Steppin' Out Flav Style
programme.desc: Four girls are left and it's time to go on a little trip. Flav takes two girls down to the shore for a day of sailing with his ladies as crew. Then to the luxurious Queen Mary for an overnight.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Oh No She Didn't! (Clip Show)
programme.desc: A lot of incredible stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls' arrived.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Flav Belize In Love (Finale)
programme.desc: Two girls remain. To celebrate having made it this far, Flav takes the two girls to Placencia Belize for an exotic three day getaway during their stay.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: After the Lovin (Reunion)
programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the Flavorettes from season 2 are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Sparks fly when DJ Pauly D and Vinny invite their ex-girlfriends to live and work with them in Las Vegas. But will old wounds and the temptations of Sin City make finding love a losing bet?

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny attempt to make amends with their exes. The prank war champions continue their reign when they make the new guys their next target. A one night stand sparks drama in the suite.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly and Vinny's reputations are on the line when their suitemates embarrass themselves on their first day of work. Marissa confesses her one night stand to her mom.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: Pauly tries to make peace with Nikki but leaves her in tears. Vinny confronts Maria about her past insults. The suite is left reeling after an ill-advised hook up.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny
programme.desc: The suite is shocked when Pauly and Nikki rekindle their rocky romance. The girls devise a plan to expose Antonio's "cheating." Meanwhile, Derryn hooks up with a stripper.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Andrew Shelton declares he's the unluckiest person to ever play Deal or No Deal. Howie tries turns things around with a special side game-will it break Andrew's unlucky streak?

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When, in response to Joey's ridicule, Dwayne challenges him to a fight, Joey feels he has to go through with it. Meanwhile, Stephanie finally realizes, after weeks of flirtation, that Simon is interested in Alexa, not her.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When the Degrassi Jr. High quiz team goes to Kathleen's house to prepare for a match, they discover that Kathleen's mother is an alcoholic. Rich and Caitlin offer Kathleen their support.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Sick of being confused with her twin sister Heather, Erica is determined to define herself as an individual. She finds an opportunity at the Spring Dance, where she is found passionately kissing a strange boy!

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: As Stephanie's mother makes plans to remarry and her father continues to fight for custody of her and her brother, Stephanie becomes increasingly despondent. She even starts to talk about suicide.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: A group of parents demands that Spike be moved to another school because her pregnancy sets a bad example. Some of the students agree, but Caitlin writes an article for the school newspaper supporting Spike.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When the school board votes to expel Spike from Degrassi, the students wonder why Spike is being kicked out. Meanwhile, disaster strikes when Joey and Wheels talk Snake into letting them spend the night when his parents are away.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Though Lucy's friends have encouraged her to report her harassment by a substitute teacher, she is embarrassed by the incident. However, when the teacher returns to Degrassi and assaults another girl, she and Lucy decide to go to the principal.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Wheels worries that he might not pass his final exams, while Joey discovers that he may have to repeat the year. The eighth graders' dreams of high school are crushed when they find out Degrassi plans to add a ninth grade.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Wheels' adoptive parents forbid him to see Joey, but Wheels sneaks over to see him when they go out. When Wheels returns, he finds that his parents have been killed in an automobile accident.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Wheels' adoptive parents forbid him to see Joey, but Wheels sneaks over to see him when they go out. When Wheels returns, he finds that his parents have been killed in an automobile accident.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Lucy's infatuation with Paul, her high school boyfriend, continues to escalate, but at a party she finds she's not ready to meet his sexual expectations.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: It is the holiday season at Degrassi, but all is not cheerful. Yick and Arthur bicker after Yick teases Arthur about being rich, but, encouraged by Arthur's cousin Dorothy, they remember their past experiences together and salvage their friendship.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Joey asks Caitlin to be his partner for a class assignment and Caitlin who has a crush on him, jumps at the chance.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Snake's older brother Glenn, an all-star athlete, returns home unexpectedly from medical school to tell his family that he is gay.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Caitlin, the editor of Degrassi Digest, becomes interested in animal rights with Liz organizes a protest against scientific experiments on animals. But when Caitlin does some of her own research, she discovers that there are two sides to every story.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: A believer in astrology, Erica reads in her horoscope that romance in on the rise and promptly falls madly in love with Clutch.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: A stickler for perfection, Kathleen is demonstrating symptoms of anorexia, even as she devotes her energies to winning first place in the Science Fair.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Melanie can’t come up with the twenty dollars she needs to buy a concert ticket, she borrows it from her mother's purse. Shane tells Spike he can't pay for child support so that he can buy a ticket instead, and Joey makes a twenty-dollar bet.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Still trying to come to terms with his adoptive parents' death, Wheels runs away to be with his biological father, who has sent him a postcard. When he arrives, however, he receives a cool welcome.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Still trying to come to terms with his adoptive parents' death, Wheels runs away to be with his biological father, who has sent him a postcard. When he arrives, however, he receives a cool welcome.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Arthur feels rejected when his father continues to see more and more of a new girlfriend.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: B.L.T. fights with an upperclassman who makes a racist comment. Later, when he asks Michelle to the dance, her parents forbid her to go with him because he is black.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Alexa's parents won't let her have a party, Lucy offers to host one instead, since her parents are going away.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: The third term at Degrassi Junior High ends with a bang. Wheels passes algebra, but Spike is not so lucky.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen-year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley has set her sights on becoming Degrassi's School President. Toby, spurred on by their awkward new situation as step-siblings, is frustrated by her unchallenged status and convinces JT to run against her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that crime and drugs not only damage victims but also harm the families of the perpetrators, especially the kids. And both of the fugitives he's chasing today have left shattered families and struggling women in their wake.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot bounty comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt. When the ladies object, Dog explains his decision, "We're a family of hunters, we need to hunt."

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: On the witness stand, Steven testified he saw Alexis push Mark to his death. Jeff sees other women in an attempt to forget Fallon but remains obsessed with his ex-wife. Alexis takes the stand and testifies.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.desc: Krystle reconciles with Daniel, who reveals that his break-up with her sister was amicable. Claudia moves into La Mirage. Krystle confides to Steven that Daniel is Sammy Jo's father and therefore little Danny's grandfather.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia rebuffs Steven's conciliatory attempts. Tension between Dex and Amanda continues to mount. On his deathbed, Tom Carrington makes amends with Blake, and in a final dramatic gesture, has his will changed.

programme.desc: Krystle begins working with Daniel. Blake is adamantly opposed and exchanges harsh words with Reece. Dex is furious with Alexis for traveling to Sumatra to see Blake's father. Alexis learns from Amanda about Dex's experience with Daniel in Vietnam.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.desc: Elyse gets so wrapped up in work that she neglects her family.

programme.desc: Monica steps in when a caustic female radio show host uses personal information about her daughter’s social life to boost her on-air ratings

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.desc: Monica puts on a police uniform to save a cop whose drug habit will soon destroy him

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica's job in a strip joint leads to work as the baby sitter to a child with a terrible facial deformity

programme.title: Tai Chi Master [English Subtitled]

programme.desc: Elusive assassin Drizzle transforms herself into modest shop owner Zeng Jing (Michelle Yeoh) in order to transport the remains of an exalted Buddhist monk to their eternal resting place, but finds her mission unexpectedly complicated.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: Legendary action director Yuen Woo Ping draws on a stellar cast (Michelle Yeoh, Dave Bautista, Tony Jaa, and Max Zhang) to create a hard-hitting martial arts blast worthy of its place in the celebrated IP MAN universe.

programme.title: Supercop (1996)
programme.desc: Jackie Chan, Michelle Yeoh, and Maggie Cheung lead an action-packed classic with jaw-dropping stunts, from leaping out a ten-story building onto an airborne helicopter to landing on top of a speeding train.

programme.title: Karate Killer
programme.desc: Kiba is back again, but this time he has fallen from grace and sent to prison for all the violent acts he has committed. Once he's out, he begins working as a bodyguard in a club that is crawling with gangsters.

programme.title: Iron Protector
programme.desc: After his clan master's death, Wu-Lin guards a wealthy family's daughter in the City of Stone-cold. When she's targeted by a gang, he fights back, uncovering a darker plot.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Ip Man is the award-winning film adaptation about the life story of Ip Man, the grandmaster of the Wing Chun style of kung fu and sifu of legendary martial arts superstar, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle was fatally injured in what police believed to be a hit-and-run accident. Tiny clues found at the scene created a picture of the vehicle which struck him and led police to its driver.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, Rhoda Nathan was found murdered in a Cincinnati hotel room. When hotel employee Elwood Jones visited the emergency room with an infected hand, which he said was cut on a dumpster, the doctor recognized the injury as something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Susan Fassett was gunned down as she left her church choir practice in Poughkeepsie, NY. After clearing her husband, police turned their attention to Fred Andros, with whom Susan had an affair.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shortly after daybreak, a fire is started in a dumpster in Vancouver. No one sees the arsonist or the fire, which burns for hours in the deserted parking lot. But there's more than garbage in this flaming container.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray was charged in her husband's death. Her son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school, studied all of the evidence and, eventually, discovered the truth of what really happened between his parents.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.desc: El patrullero de carreteras de California George Gwaltney descubrió el cuerpo de Robin Bishop, de 23 años, cerca de su auto en una carretera remota en el desierto.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Vagaba por las calles de la ciudad de Nueva York llevando solo piyamas y una bata de baño, pero el FBI estaba convencido de que Vince Gigante, el reputado jefe de la familia genovesa del crimen, no estaba loco.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 26 de febrero de 1993, una explosión sacudió el estacionamiento del Centro Mundial de Comercio. Seis personas murieron y más de mil resultaron heridas en la explosión que dejó un cráter de cinco pisos en el edificio.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando un joven y su madre fueron secuestrados y asesinados por un temible cartel de drogas, los agentes del FBI en el campo trabajaron sin descanso para colarse en el submundo secreto de las drogas y sacar a la luz a los que estaban involucrados.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Agentes se ven obligados a utilizar la pistola eléctrica contra una persona suicida. Los policías reconocen a un sospechoso, y lo persiguen por el campo. Un sospechoso intenta esconderse de la policía en una casa abandonada.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Tres hombres intentan convencen a los policías que su carro no es robado. Los oficiales llegan cuando alguien confunde el dedo de otra persona con postre. Un sospechoso de abuso doméstico intenta escapar de la policía.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un grupo de sospechosos juegan carreras con un vehículo robado. Un borracho tiene un cuchillo y parece que no escuchará las órdenes de los oficiales. Dos sospechosos regresan otra vez a la cárcel por sus problemas con las drogas.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospecho de manejar ebrio intenta huir de los oficiales para irse a jugar boliche. Un hombre desnudo se esconde en el porche de una mujer. Una niña de 8 años hace berrinche cuando le prohíben usar Facebook y la policía tiene que intervenir.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso escapa y provoca que los agentes lo persigan por un arroyo. Un adolescente intenta ayudar a una mujer y termina envuelto en una extraña pelea doméstica. Después de destruir su propia casa, una mujer ruega que la arresten.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un hombre llama a la policía para que se lleven a su agresivo compañero de cuarto. Agentes tienen que arrestar a un hombre violento en un lugar público. La policía detiene a un sospechoso sobrio, pero con problemas existenciales.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso sale a cortarse el pelo y termina en la cárcel. Agentes tratan de descubrir el motivo de una pelea callejera. La policía detiene un auto por falta de registro y sus pasajeros terminan en la cárcel por posesión de drogas.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso desafiante termina mordido por un perro policía. Un ex-prometido se convierte en la molestia del vecindario. Un retén rutinario termina en órdenes judiciales contra una mujer embarazada.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: En Nueva York, una estudiante universitaria ambiciosa tiene toda la vida por delante, hasta cruzarse en el camino de un asesino.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Fotografía forense: los fotógrafos forenses son unas de las primeras personas en llegar a la escena del crimen. Ellos captan pistas fundamentales con su lente.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Investigaciones explosivas: el laboratorio criminal es el sitio donde la ciencia se junta con el asesinato. En el estado de Nueva York, Eleanor Fowler abrió un paquete pequeño que había llegado a su casa.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Los psicólogos forenses entran a las mentes de los asesinos en serie para explicar por qué, en la mayoría de los casos, pueden ser un vecino amistoso o un compañero de trabajo tenaz; uno que esconde su lado oscuro.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: The Legendary Barry White

programme.title: The Music of Duke Ellington and Lionel Hampton

programme.title: The Strange Case of Alice Cooper: Live 1979

programme.title: To Russia With Elton

programme.title: Tupac Vs.

programme.title: And The Beat Goes On: The Sonny And Cher Story
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography of Sonny Bono, this film focuses on the volatile relationship between Sonny (Jay Underwood) and Cher (Renee Faia) during the early 60's to their divorce in the late 70's.

programme.title: Bowie: The Man Who Changed The World
programme.desc: An inside look at David Bowie, one of the most creative and influential rock artists of all time. Featuring exclusive contributions from those who worked with David Bowie and archive interviews with the man himself.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Cuando todo era paz y armonía la llegada de la Boss, hará poner las pilas a los chicos antes de que vayan a pasar un día de campo. Con los chicos cansados de pasar un día en el campo llega una nueva fuente de energía, Potro vuelve al grupo

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Después del encontronazo viene la pelea y así es como comienza el capítulo. Todos los chicos intentan mediar en la pelea, pero entre ellas ya no se toleran y no dudarán en utilizar todas sus armas para conseguir dañar a su oponente

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
