programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock runs into a series of high-level roadblocks when he goes to Washington to defend a popular columnist accused of murdering her source.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock finds himself in a legal dilemma: his client stuns the courtroom with a confession, and then, saying that government agents had persuaded her to do so, tries to recant it.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock defends Paul J. Bartel, a top TV producer accused of murdering the programming chief at the top-rated network, and finds the case has more twists than most Hollywood scripts.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When a renowned author is murdered, Matlock defends the accused – the subject of a biography the victim was writing – only to encounter a disturbing revelation about his client midway through the trial.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock tries to defend hard-drinking country singer Jimmy Legrand after he’s arrested for the murder of his wife’s sister, but Legrand was so drunk on the night of the crime that he honestly can’t remember if he killed her.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock serves double duty: defending Brian Emerson, who’s charged with killing his ex-wife, and babysitting Emerson’s 6-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock travels to Las Vegas to defend a friend, Lt. Jim Manning, charged with murdering his girlfriend, Laura, a young woman who was living a double life.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock learns there is more to an exclusive health spa than workouts when his client, Donna Stewart, is accused of murdering a sexy, young exercise instructor who had been having an affair with her husband.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Julie March becomes Ben Matlock’s houseguest at an inopportune time in their relationship. Julie is the prosecuting attorney in a murder case that has Ben defending dance instructor Scott Lazar for the hit-and-run death of his benefactor – and lover.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock is surprised to learn that his long-time client, respected businessman Craig Gentry, is the son of mob boss Sam Gerard. The ace attorney must defend Craig of the murder of a senator who was investigating organized crime.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock has his hands full defending his client, Craig Gentry, while also trying to prevent a full-scale mob war from breaking out between Craig’s father and two of his enemies.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock is hired to defend Hal Simpson, an irate investor accused of murdering Robert Ullman, the smooth-talking owner of Fountain of Youth Elixir Creams, who was really promoting a phony get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer comes closer to its boiling point when a priest is burned to death inside the effigy of a straw woman and more people burst into flames spontaneously, as though by witchcraft.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Nine years after Ferdy Villers killed himself, his family reunites for Christmas, unaware that someone is out for revenge.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Undertaker Patrick Pennyman is found dead with his wrists slashed and suspicion turns towards a spiritualist church.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: During a regatta, the body of Rowing Club chairman Guy Sweetman is found bludgeoned and drowned. Bachelor Sweetman was prolifically promiscuous so jealousy would seem to be the motive.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott follow a trail of dead people involved in the collecting of rare orchids.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A four-member syndicate owns a racehorse that two of them are desperate to sell and two of them are determined to keep. When one of them is murdered, Barnaby is on the case.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: John Ransom collapses and dies outside a pub after a fight with his brother-in-law over the baptism of his niece. He has electrical scars across the top of his head.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Troubled solicitor Nick Turner falls from the roof of his home. Is this suicide disguised as murder?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a corporate giant tries to acquire a small but respected relish factory owned and run by a dysfunctional family, a naked body is found in the warehouse.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan tries to close the biggest deal of his life, and he plans on sealing it with a kiss; a winter wonderland awaits Fredrik in Sweden; a twist throws Luis for a loop as he sees the finish line for his Brooklyn townhouse.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: In Sweden, dog-sledding and snowball fights are part of Fredrik's pitch as he tries to fetch a record-setting price for a mountaintop home; Fredrik makes a personal pitch that could impact his future; Ryan gives Olivia a shot at the big leagues.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis' search for a missing broker comes to an unexpected end and has a profound effect on him; developers hold Fredrik's feet to the flames; the time has come to sell a penthouse and settle a bet between Ryan and Olivia.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: A re-energized Luis reaches out to old friends in an effort to close a deal that has eluded him in the past; Fredrik faces competition while trying to win a project; fiancée Emilia has news that catches Ryan off guard.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik takes buyers on a Hudson River cruise to interest them in his new West Side development; Luis and a developer embark on a plan to create a massive unit overlooking Central Park, but one of Ryan's clients may stop them dead in their tracks.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis tries to lure Ryan back to the negotiating table after the two reach a stalemate over the Central Park South unit; Ryan must salvage a deal that falls through after the buyer is arrested; Fredrik will stop at nothing to impress a client.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis will do anything to solidify his standing as a major player, even if it means teaming up with a rival; Fredrik receives devastating news; Ryan uses out-of-the-box thinking to come up with a way to lure brokers to an out-of-the-way listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: At the Metropolitan Tower, Luis and Ryan run into complications while co-listing; Ryan's fiancée, Emilia, gets in the middle of things; Fredrik lands a heavenly listing with a hellish downside.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan tries the buyers' patience while trying out a new pricing strategy for a downtown duplex; Fredrik promises a buyer something his developer may not be able to deliver; Luis and a new co-lister dig a hole for themselves.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik reunites with a former client in the Williamsburg neighborhood; Luis hopes to repair his rocky relationship with a rebellious co-lister; Ryan tackles an enormous townhouse that may be too big for most New Yorkers.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: A telephone call breathes new life into a development project, but it comes with a catch Fredrik never saw coming; Ryan bends over backward for a potential buyer but receives nothing in return; Luis gets first dibs on a hot new Tribeca building.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: For a new development in the NoHo neighborhood, Fredrik summons the spirit of a dead icon; after a failed shot, Luis chases down one of New York City's biggest developers; Ryan picks up a penthouse in the Flatiron District with a difficult co-lister.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan's relationship with his co-lister hangs by a thread, prompting him to try something new; Luis finds himself caught in the middle while trying to please a married couple; Fredrik hopes a rival will save him after the developer raises prices.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis lands a listing with a former broker who helped him launch his career; Fredrik struggles to sell a $30 billion penthouse in Tribeca; Ryan tries to save his skin after showing too much of someone else's in a marketing campaign.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik confronts a broker who is circling his $30 million penthouse like a vulture; Luis will do anything for a buyer and dog; a delighted Ryan lands a listing that previously belonged to Fredrik.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis faces an emotional crossroads; Fredrik tries to cash in on a NoHo loft that once was the site of the country's largest bank robbery; in Tribeca, Ryan tries to succeed where Fredrik failed.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan trades his suit for a more unique outfit after landing a building in Hell's Kitchen; Luis' idea of having a business partner gets more complicated when an open house challenges him to think about his future; Fredrik goes to London.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as a 50-year-old blind princess, heiress to a Balkan kingdom.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is assigned to knock out a boxing syndicate which fixes fights to create favorable odds for a bookmaking operation, in the first half of a two-part story.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Barney poses as a fighter making his comeback, who boxes his way to a title bout with Staczek (Robert Phillips) in the second half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force, led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) enters Equatorial Africa to crush an army of mercenaries, led by a self-styled colonel, and to return plundered gold to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Not knowing when, where, or how a dangerous adversary will strike, Jim Phelps and Cinnamon use themselves as human quarries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An army commander (played by guest star Theodore Bikel) plots to become dictator by imprisoning an influential cardinal and using a look-alike actor for a public endorsement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force offers a "fountain of youth" to the vain and dictatorial widow (guest star Ruth Roman) of the late president of a small South American country in order to depose her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest star Fernando Lamas portrays a diplomat-playboy who romances another diplomat's wife, played by Lee Grant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: With Phelps and Rollin as the leading men, the Impossible Missions Force stages an anti-American play which could prove to be a strong propaganda device for the enemy.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Negri's Music Shop where musicians are playing different homemade instruments. Mr. McFeely brings a video showing how people make ice cream cones.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Wonder what it's like to go up in a bucket lift? Mister Rogers rides 60 feet up in the air in one and then comes back down. Mr. McFeely has a video about how people make ice cream.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: There's a new store in the Neighborhood -- it's Tony Chiroldes' shop where he sells books, toys and costumes. Tony has always been curious about what it would be like to travel in outer space, and he tries on an astronaut costume.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Guitarist Manuel Barrueco provides an amazing performance. King Friday requests a "looking inside things device" from Corney. The best Corney could come up with is a "look carefully device" magnifying glass.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about the graceful nature of the fish. He visits a ballet studio where he watches a performance. Lady Elaine wants H.J. Elephant to be on her first program, but H.J. is hesitant since he cannot read very well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: What's in Mister Rogers' box? There are words for people who know how to read words, pictures for people who know how to read pictures and a toy truck! Mister Rogers shows a video with different big trucks.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: H.J. Elephant recieves help from Mayor Maggie as he reads his first words. Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about how people make ball caps. Before he leaves, Mr. McFeely is allowed to take one of Mister Rogers' caps with him.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a small potted oak tree he is looking after for Mr. McFeely. Prince Tuesday is unhappy with his drawing of the Eiffel Tower. Mayor Maggie compliments Prince Tuesday and gives it to a very pleased Grandpere.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bag of sand, which he takes to the back yard, where he adds it to his sand table. Lady Elaine Fairchilde is not impressed with the art creations made by the others and appoints herself judge of the festival.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers creates a replica of Trolley out of dough. Lady Elaine is not impressed with Neighbor Aber's artwork, but King Friday finds it inspirational. Daniel Tiger is sad because Lady Elaine has criticized his artwork.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets a musician playing a glass harmonica. Dr. Platypus practices his bagpipes with Handyman Negri on guitar and King Friday on the bass violin.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: It's the Neighborhood of Make-Believe Arts Festival, and all the neighbors are finding their own ways to express themselves. Mister Rogers encourages his "television friends" to appreciate the wide variety of art!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a pretzel factory to see how people make pretzels. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday and Queen Sara have an argument, which worries Prince Tuesday. He runs away to the home of his friend Daniel Tiger.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a garage where electric cars are being made, and he takes one out for a drive. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Handyman Negri organizes a search for Prince Tuesday, and the unhappy Prince is finally found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes on an airplane and visits with the pilot and flight attendant, who show him around the plane to help children feel more familiar when traveling by air.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches former Pittsburgh Steeler wide receiver Lynn Swann practice ballet with a dance company. He tells Mister Rogers how dancing has helped him play football. Lynn Swann also visits the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday announces the winner of the “Draw The Neighborhood” contest and awards a very unusual prize to everyone -- a rainbow. Mister Rogers shows a video of how real gold is processed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a ventriloquist's dummy he played with as a child. Bob Dog falls and is hurt. They take him to the hospital. King, Friday, prohibits play. Mister Rogers says play is important in learning to manage feelings.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: When King Friday outlaws play, Lady Elaine moves her Museum Go-Round to an entirely new location. She finds herself in a place where play is welcome—a play park, where she meets Barbara Russell.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses scissors and talks about safety. Lady Elaine tells Officer Clemmons she won't return to the Neighborhood until King Friday changes his rule against play. Lou Schreiber, Johnny Costa, and Joe Negri play music together.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a cave. Lady Elaine won't return until the no-play rule is changed. King Friday removes the ban when he realizes his fanfare cannot be played.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers walks on stilts and talks about how long it took him to learn to walk on them. Bob Dog persuades Lady Elaine Fairchilde to return to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mister Rogers talks about different ways of playing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how a player piano works. Corney's latest shipment of rocking chairs has been made with half pretzel parts. Mister Rogers talks about how important it is to do things well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a doll factory. Corney makes King Friday dolls. Lady Elaine is jealous. Mr. McFeely show Mister Rogers a swimming doll. Mister Rogers says he will take us to where he swims.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The history of long-duration life in space from the first Soviet station to Skylab to Mir to the International Space Station; what it is like to live in space, as well as the monumental obstacles engineers and astronauts overcame to make it possible.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Made up of soldiers and civilians, scientists and specialists in an enormous variety of fields, the US Army Corps of Engineers was created over 200 years ago by Congressional mandate to respond, in peace and war, to the nation's engineering needs.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Since its completion in 1869, the Suez Canal has been a vital link in world trade and a point of controversy in geopolitics; today, more than 20,000 ships transit the canal yearly.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Many rivers quenched the thirst of millions in the American west and around the world; without these aqueducts, some of the earth's largest cities would turn into gigantic ghost towns.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The U.S. Navy's diving and salvage programs; the USS Salvor's underwater remote-operated robots; bomb-locating minisub Alvin.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: When the men and women aboard a modern submarine hear the command to dive, they can take a measure of comfort in the fact that no US sub has been lost in nearly 40 years, though it's been said that the sea is a more hostile environment than space.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.desc: Don Cangrejo monta un show de talentos en el Crustáceo Cascarudo. / Bob Esponja le enseña a Plankton qué es la diversión.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja compra músculos inflables para verse mejor. / Bob y Patricio derriten una estatua de cera de Calamardo y creen que lo mataron, Calamardo sale del baño y les hace creer que es su fantasma.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja va con Perlita a un baile de su escuela. / Bob Esponja y Calamardo pelean para ver quién es el empleado del mes del Crustáceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo viaja sin querer en una máquina del tiempo. / Bob Esponja y Arenita pelean karate en todos los lugares y Bob debe evitar pelear en el Crustaceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se sale de sus sueños y visita los sueños de sus amigos. / Bob Esponja enferma de peste y Patricio trata de curarlo para evitar que Arenita lo lleve con el Doctor.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Arenita planean darle un hermoso regalo a Patricio en el día de San Valentín. / Bob Esponja juega con un trozo de papel que quiere Calamardo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo reúne a Bob Esponja y Patricio para buscar el tesoro escondido del holandés volador. / Bob y Patricio toman un autobús que los deja atrapados en una ciudad muy extraña, llamada Fondo de Roca.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Arenita quiere volver a Texas, pero Bob Esponja y Patricio tratan de evitarlo. / Plankton intenta enseñarle a Bob Esponja a ser malo como él.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo se estremece cuando ve que es el día de los inocentes, Bob Esponja hace bromas en el día de los inocentes. / Bob Esponja saca la espátula de Neptuno, pero Neptuno lo reta al no creer que el la sacó.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio van a un lugar donde hay muchos anzuelos y ellos juegan con los anzuelos sin saber que en verdad son muy peligrosos. / Bob Esponja gana un concurso y gana la trompa de alarma de Triton y Chico Percebe.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja consigue un empleo en el Crustáceo Cascarudo. / Bob Esponja usa una aspiradora para quitar una almeja de su jardín. / Bob conoce una ardilla llamada Arenita.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja construye un puesto para hacer burbujas. / Bob Esponja rompe sus pantalones y aprovecha para ser gracioso.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio intentan convencer a Calamardo para que los acompañe a pescar medusas. / El Crustáceo Cascarudo se convierte en un caos cuando Plankton intenta robar la fórmula secreta de la Cangrebúrguer.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo hace que Bob Esponja y Patricio ya no sean amigos y trata de unirlos. / Bob Esponja hace una prueba de conducción con ayuda de Patricio.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Calamardo tratan de entregar una pizza a un cliente del Crustáceo Cascarudo. / Bob Esponja busca una casa nueva después de que los nematodos se comieran su casa.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio visitan a sus héroes Sirenoman y Chico Percebe a un asilo. / Bob Esponja olvida la fórmula de las Cangreburguers después de que olvido los pepinillos de la Cangreburguer de un cliente.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja es vigilante del aula y vigila la ciudad erróneamente ocasionando caos en la ciudad del Fondo de Bikini. / Bob Esponja se lleva una medusa a su casa.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Eugene se decepciona al saber que su héroe preferido no hace sus propias acrobacias. Arnold y la pandilla hacen un viaje escolar a la ópera y tienen sus propios sueños musicales.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: En la noche de Halloween, el vecindario sucumbe a la idea de los extraterrestres, cuando Arnold y Gerald transmiten un programa en la radio anunciando que han aterrizado naves espaciales.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold busca a su autora favorita, quien resulta ser todo lo contrario a lo que reflejan sus dulces y sentimentales libros. / Un chico rico se une a la clase de Arnold. Arnold y el grupo le muestran cómo es realmente la vida en la gran ciudad.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Bajo los efectos del gas hilarante, Helga deja un mensaje confesando su amor en el contestador de Arnold. / Después de que Harold roba un poco de carne de la carnicería, es sentenciado a trabajar para cumplir su castigo.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold rompe accidentalmente una promesa que le hizo a Iggy y debe enfrentar las consecuencias. / Big Bob contrata a una niñera para Helga. Helga la enfrenta en su propio juego y la obliga a renunciar.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A dragon regains his boyish form, a noble warrior once feared dead makes a shocking resurrection, and bitter enemies set aside their differences to enjoy a well-deserved feast!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The weary marines and the rescued children get teary-eyed as they say goodbye to the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Law enters into treacherous negotiations with Joker!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On their way after having set out from Punk Hazard, the Straw Hats find out their next destination - just as a huge wave comes crashing down on the Sunny! But it's rough sailing for the G-5 as well, as Donflamingo arrives on the scene and wreaks havoc!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Aokiji's intercession saves Smoker and sends Joker off to rethink his strategy, leaving unanswered questions about Aokiji's current status. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats catch their breath as the Sunny makes its way through the rough seas of the New World.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Smooth seas stretch out before the Straw Hats as they leave Punk Hazard far behind -- but while they fear Donflamingo's return and prepare to face him, another foe lies in wait, whose powers could be their downfall!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Breed has Luffy, Trafalgar, and Chopper firmly in his grasp with his Peto-Peto power! Breed dreams of a world in which he has enslaved all the humans, but Luffy's stubborn persistence and unwillingness to cooperate may have landed him in hot water.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy meets an unexpected acquaintance from the past, Bellamy, who seems to be up to no good! Meanwhile, Caesar Handover Team encounters a snag when they learn just how dangerous Green Bit is!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao's hatred of Garp and Luffy is finally explained, while his battle against Luffy comes to an end. With tremendous power, one of them is squarely eliminated! But is that really the end of the Colosseum battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Castalians board the Andromeda to finalize the charter for the New Commonwealth. When the leader is discovered dead, Tyr is the main suspect.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka learns that her father's former business partner deals in a highly addictive drug called Flash. The rest of the crew holds a "garage sale" to earn money for new ship parts.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda discovers her "sister ship", the Pax Magellanic. The crew aboard Pax is 300 years old, but have not aged a day

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr crash lands the Eureka Maru on a Nietzschean planet and develops amnesia. He must remember what he is doing before the Nietzscheans discover him and his crate of stolen goods.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper receives the "gift" of knowledge from a dying Perseid, only to discover that the Perseid was being hunted by a bounty hunter, who has now turned his attention to Harper.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is arrested for assassinating a dictator 300 years ago, by the man he helped install in his place. The new dictator ended up being much, much worse.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda is boarded by a drone from the Consensus of Parts, a mythical mechanical society. While friendly at first, the drone tries to force the ship to join the Consensus.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Gerentex is back and demands Trance and Harper help him with his new scheme: finding Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan and Rev Bem help a peaceful society stand up to their would-be slavers. They have to be careful because if Dylan teaches them to kill, their kids will be born knowing it.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan attempts to bring peace to two different Nietzschean prides by escorting the princess of one to her arranged marriage to the prince of the other.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommie's avatar falls in love with what turns out to be the avatar of a warship named Gabriel. Gabriel attempts to infect Rommie with a virus that broadcasts its plans to the warship.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka takes the Andromeda to Tarn-Vedra, but extended time in the slipstream causes side effects. To combat them, Beka starts taking Flash and soon becomes addicted.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: An old memory from the Andromeda is accidentally activated, which sends her on a mission and leaves Dylan and the crew unable to override the command.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: With the Andromeda damaged by their deadliest enemies, Dylan and Rommie must rescue Tyr, Harper, and Rev from a Magog World ship.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: In 1981, a mother vanishes from the Hernando woods and the case goes cold and 33 years later, local detectives take the baton from Kelly and the Cold Justice team only to discover that getting a confession may be the only way to solve the case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother of two disappears after a night out at a local bar in New Mexico; investigators race the clock in the hopes of finding her alive, and are eventually stunned by what they uncover.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A shooting in broad daylight in the city of Waterloo, Iowa leaves two dead; investigators Camarata and Moller follow a trail of bloody footprints to a list of suspects and an unexpected lead from a knowledgeable confidential informant.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Women are found brutally murdered and panic strikes Baton Rouge; the city suspects a serial killer is on the loose; in an example of police work at its finest, detectives lead investigators to an unlikely suspect hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a hardworking single mother with a history of heart issues is found dead on the front steps of her home, detectives assume she died of natural causes, but as the investigation progresses, it becomes clear foul play was involved.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: In Florida, a devoted mother disappears into the night after tucking her daughter into bed; investigators chase down a trail of leads that include multiple suspects, culminating in a horrifying discovery.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother's only hope of finding her missing 20-year-old daughter rests in the hands of a seasoned investigator from the DA's office, who takes on her case after it's been cold for seven years.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a college freshman goes missing without a trace, concerned friends and family talk to police about his last whereabouts; those conversations, however, raise more questions than answers when they point to a potentially deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A wife returns home to find her husband shot dead, and detectives search for the truth for two years.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Sharknado

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Sharknado 2

programme.desc: Bashir must use questionable methods in order to keep Vedek Bareil alive long enough to help bring about a Bajoran peace treaty with Cardassia.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A desperate situation that could cost Kira her life forces Odo to face the depth of his feelings for her.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko ignores an ancient Bajoran prophecy of doom in order to undertake a joint scientific venture with the Cardassians.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When the Ferengi leader suddenly decides to abolish his race's greedy ways, Quark is determined to find out the truth behind his actions.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: An accident causes O'Brien to jump into the near future, where he witnesses his own death . . . and worse.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Comatose and dying after an alien attack, Bashir must access different parts of his personality, which take the form of crew members, to save his life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: In a parallel universe, Sisko must assume the role of his dead counterpart in order to save the mirror version of his late wife.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While visiting a planet under civil war, Dr. Crusher is taken hostage by an opposing faction of the planet's ruling government.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Much to Picard's displeasure, Q reappears on the Enterprise, claiming to have been ejected from the Q Continuum, and therefore, lost his powers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The widow of respected scientist Dr. Nel Apgar accuses Riker of seducing her and killing her husband. Rather than turn Riker over for unfavorable trial, the Enterprise reconstructs the facts.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise C enters the Enterprise D's time and space continuum, where they find Picard and crew in a constant state of war with the Klingons, and only Guinan knows it.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After returning from a cybernetics conference to the Enterprise, Data creates his own "child," much to the chagrin of his captain, and without regards to the ramifications with Starfleet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A Klingon commander boards the Enterprise in an officer exchange program initiated by Starfleet, much to the chagrin of the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard is kidnapped and held with three different aliens and meanwhile replaced with a replica as impostor captain.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After mediating a difficult peace agreement, Captain Picard is encouraged to take a much needed rest on a vacationing planet, where he's visited by a strange race from the future, in search of a dangerous weapon.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise reaches out to an alien being while dancing around with the Romulans, who want to attack it in an act of vengeance.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A shy member of the "Enterprise" crew becomes addicted to the holodeck, where relationships are easier there than in real life, when his knowledge is needed in engineering.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When transporting a dangerous material to the Enterprise, Data is kidnapped and the crew is led to believe he is dead when the shuttlecraft he was piloting explodes enroute.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Legendary Federation ambassador Sarek visits the Enterprise to conclude peace talks with a race called the Legarans.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Deanna's mother spurns advances made by a Ferengi Daimon, he takes it upon himself to kidnap the two of them, along with Commander Riker and steal them away aboard his ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise finds a deserted planet where a ship has crashed, and, with it, the lone survivor with no memory, but extraordinary healing powers.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew discovers an alien training ground for the destruction of Earth.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew is in serious danger when all of their dreams seem to come true and home seems closer in sight.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: During a mission against the Borg, Seven of Nine is lured back to the Collective.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Jackson's body is swapped with that of an old Goa'uld enemy. As Jackson lies dying in the alien's ancient body, O'Neill and Teal'c accidentally switch forms too, and unless the alien is captured, all will be trapped in their new bodies forever!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1's arch-enemy Apophis is dying and seeks sanctuary with O'Neill. But what he really wants is a new host in exchange for his knowledge of the Goa'uld. Will O'Neill grant his request or send him back to the Goa'uld to face his fate?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a routine recon mission, the SG-1 team discovers a new, friendly life form. But the encounter turns deadly for the new race because of a virus SG-1 inadvertently introduces. Can SG-1 develop a vaccine before this plague eradicates a civilization?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A boy mysteriously appears at SGC and pleas for help, claiming the Goa'uld are chasing him to find a race of invisible beings. But the SG-1 team doesn't know that the invisible aliens plan to destroy humanity…and their invasion has already begun!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A solar flare sends the SG-1 team back to 1969, where the U.S. military suspects the team of espionage. O'Neill and his team escape with two Woodstock-bound kids, desperate to find the Stargate before they're stuck in the psychedelic past forever.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After a series of anomalies and power disruptions, the Atlantis team is faced with an impossible decision: to create the means to release an mysterious entity or stand by as it systematically destroys the city’s technological infrastructure.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: On a flight back to Atlantis, McKay inexplicably falls ill. Fearing the worst, the doctor summons McKay’s sister to say her goodbyes. But Ronan tells Jeannie of a shrine that would grant Rodney one day to be himself again, before he dies.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Dr. Beckett (Paul McGillion) is asked to delay his departure from Atlantis when word comes that Major Anne Teldy (Christina Cox) and her away team have stumbled onto one of Michael’s abandoned labs inside an extensive underground catacomb.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Keller and the Atlantis team meet with the Wraith, Todd, to deliver a startling proposition. Keller believes she has found a cure for the Wraiths of their need to feed on humans but requires a test subject for this breakthrough treatment.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay and Ronan volunteer to assist Dr. Jennifer Keller with a medical follow-up away from Atlantis. Later, when the pair return to her, they are surprised to learn that she left earlier but a search of the village turns up no sign of her.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1’s Dr. Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) travels to Atlantis when his research suggests that a rebellious Ancient scientist named Janus (Gildart Jackson) may have hidden a secret lab somewhere within the city.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Jackson and McKay have reactivated the Attero device, an ancient machine designed to annihilate the Wraith. In doing so, they discover the reason the device was ultimately abandoned… Meanwhile, Todd continues to hold the Daedalus crew captive.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Col. Sheppard and his team locate Dr. Carson Beckett on an alien planet where he is treating a small group of survivors of the Hoffan plague. But that same evening, a party of Wraith warriors arrives, threatening total annihilation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and encounter mysterious phenomenon that hint at the original battle occurring just out of sight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Escaping from walkers, Connie and Virgil hide in a house occupied by mysterious creatures; Pope tests Daryl's loyalty to the Reapers with a conflicting mission; Kelly leaves Alexandria in search of Connie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie and Elijah learn a new survival tactic from Negan; Eugene's group clears walkers to pay their fines; Yumiko interviews for an upper-class job; Daryl learns more about Leah and the Reapers; Gabriel encounters a man of God.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Reapers defend Meridian from an incoming herd; Pope suspects Maggie is behind the attack, while Daryl treads carefully; Alexandrians scramble to protect themselves when a violent storm leaves them vulnerable to walkers.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Jeff Horn
programme.desc: On July 2nd, 2017 Manny Pacquiao battled Jeff Horn for the WBO World Welterweight title at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane in a 12 round bout that ended in a victory for Horn.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 1
programme.desc: Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought their first match in 2004, resulting in a controversial draw. Both fighters displayed incredible skill, but no clear winner emerged setting the stage for their epic rivarly.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 2
programme.desc: On March 15th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao faced Juan Manuel Marquez the second time at Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super feather weight titles with Marquez going down in round 3 Pacquiaos win was secured by split decision.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 3
programme.desc: On November 12th, 2011 Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought for the third time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBO World Welterweight titles ending in a victory for Pacquiao in this 12 round bout.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 4
programme.desc: On December 8th, 2012, Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought for their fourth and final fight. The bout ended in a stunning knockout victory for Marquez, solidifying their rivalry as one of the most memorable in boxing history.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2009, Manny Pacquiao fought Miguel Cotto for the WBO and WBC Diamond Welterweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Pacquiao put on a dominant performance, forcing the ref to stop the fight in round 12.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On December 6th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao battled Oscar De La Hoya at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a thrilling bout that lasted 8/12 rounds resulting in a victory for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Timothy Bradley III
programme.desc: On April 9th, 2016 Manny Pacquiao faced Timothy Bradley for the third time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO International Welterweight title in a 12 round bout Bradley went down in round 7 and 9 resulting in a success for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs Thomas Hearns

programme.title: Matthew Saad Muhammad vs Yaqui Lopez 1

programme.title: Michael Carabajal vs Jorge Arce

programme.title: Michael Carbajal vs Humberto Gonzalez 1

programme.title: Micky Ward vs Alfonso Sanchez

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunslinger Jake Hoyt plots a radical means of rising to power in Tombstone -- by snatching the sheriff's job away from Clay Hollister. To succeed, Hoyt plans to outshine Hollister as a sharpshooter. The result is inevitable: a dramatic showdown.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: While the survivors of an Indian attack dig the victim's grave, they discover a vein of silver. The strike ignites a wrathful dispute between the two prospectors and the dead man's kinfolk over shares of ownership of the new-found fortune.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister is taken prisoner by a trio of fugitives who need him as a guide on their escape route to Mexico. Left with his guns but no bullets, the sheriff searches desperately for a means of escape and must make a last-ditch gamble for survival.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!
